g.text: cruise — buffer recording, no TX (BW saved)

svg.text: In a 1024-word subframe: slot 0 = sync, slots 1..N per signal Ts, later slots repeat
alt deviation > 300 ft | airspeed deviation > 15 kts | pitch > 25 deg | vert_speed > 2500 fpm | roll > 45 deg
Evaluated every frame. Distress clears after 2 consecutive frames all-normal (hysteresis).
